title: rubus orthosepalus
intro: Rubus orthosepalus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a type of thorny shrub native to the Himalayas. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus orthosepalus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of heart disease. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried powder, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
